title:
Proceedings ICRISAT-AICSIP (ICAR) working group meeting on
striga control
abstract:
Striga , the parasitic weed, has long been recognized as serious
Problem on sorghum in India and many African countries. In India, it is
Known to occur in many parts causing severe damage to the sorghum crop.
It is posing a serious threat to the cultivation of high yielding sorghum
hybrids in some areas as they were found to be more susceptible to the pest.
In view of this, there is now a greater awareness of the....................
funders: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics
